category_sources: source_facts.description says Gitea is a self-hosted all-in-one software development service; official docs describe Git hosting, code review, collaboration, package registry, and CI/CD.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gitea; official site and docs use the Gitea product name.
docs_sources: Official documentation is hosted at docs.gitea.com; official GitHub README links to that documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Gitea site links to the go-gitea/gitea source repository as Open Source.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs describe Gitea as a self-hosted software development and Git hosting service with CI/CD and collaboration features.
